custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivityCounter.classPK) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivityCounter INNER JOIN User_ ON (SocialActivityCounter.classPK = User_.userId) WHERE (SocialActivityCounter.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.classNameId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.name IN ([$NAME$])) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod + ? >= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.endPeriod = -1) AND (User_.defaultUser != [$TRUE$]) AND (User_.status = 0) AND (SocialActivityCounter.active_ = [$TRUE$])

SELECT SocialActivityCounter.name, SUM(SocialActivityCounter.currentValue) currentValue, SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod, endPeriod FROM SocialActivityCounter WHERE (SocialActivityCounter.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.name = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod >= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod <= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod + ? <= ? + 1) AND (SocialActivityCounter.active_ = [$TRUE$]) GROUP BY SocialActivityCounter.name, SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod, SocialActivityCounter.endPeriod ORDER BY SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod

SELECT SocialActivityCounter.classNameId, SocialActivityCounter.name, SUM(SocialActivityCounter.currentValue) currentValue FROM SocialActivityCounter WHERE (SocialActivityCounter.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.name = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod >= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod <= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod + ? <= ? + 1) AND (SocialActivityCounter.active_ = [$TRUE$]) GROUP BY SocialActivityCounter.classNameId, SocialActivityCounter.name ORDER BY SocialActivityCounter.currentValue DESC

SELECT {SocialActivityCounter.*} FROM SocialActivityCounter WHERE (SocialActivityCounter.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.classNameId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.classPK IN ([$CLASS_PK$])) AND (SocialActivityCounter.name IN ([$NAME$])) AND (SocialActivityCounter.endPeriod = -1) AND (SocialActivityCounter.active_ = [$TRUE$]) ORDER BY SocialActivityCounter.classPK

SELECT SocialActivityCounter.classPK FROM SocialActivityCounter INNER JOIN User_ ON (SocialActivityCounter.classPK = User_.userId) WHERE (SocialActivityCounter.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.classNameId = ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.name IN ([$NAME$])) AND (SocialActivityCounter.startPeriod >= ?) AND (SocialActivityCounter.endPeriod = -1) AND (User_.defaultUser != [$TRUE$]) AND (User_.status = 0) AND (SocialActivityCounter.active_ = [$TRUE$]) GROUP BY SocialActivityCounter.classPK ORDER BY SUM(SocialActivityCounter.currentValue) DESC
SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity WHERE (groupId = ?) AND (mirrorActivityId = 0)

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Users_Groups ON (Users_Groups.userId = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Users_Groups.groupId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Organization_.organizationId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Users_Orgs.organizationId = ?)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?)

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) AND (SocialRelation.type_ = ?)

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity WHERE ( SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) ) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0)

( SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity WHERE ( SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) ) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) ) UNION ALL ( SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND ( Organization_.organizationId IN ( SELECT Users_Orgs.organizationId FROM Users_Orgs WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) ) )

SELECT COUNT(SocialActivity.activityId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND ( Organization_.organizationId IN ( SELECT Users_Orgs.organizationId FROM Users_Orgs WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) )
SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity WHERE (SocialActivity.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Users_Groups ON (Users_Groups.userId = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Users_Groups.groupId = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Organization_.organizationId = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (Users_Orgs.organizationId = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) AND (SocialRelation.type_ = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity WHERE ( SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) ) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT TEMP_TABLE.* FROM ( SELECT SocialActivity.activityId AS activityId, SocialActivity.createDate AS createDate FROM SocialActivity WHERE ( SocialActivity.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) ) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0)
UNION ALL
SELECT SocialActivity.activityId AS activityId, SocialActivity.createDate AS createDate FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND ( Organization_.organizationId IN ( SELECT Users_Orgs.organizationId FROM Users_Orgs WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) ) ) TEMP_TABLE ORDER BY TEMP_TABLE.createDate DESC

SELECT {SocialActivity.*} FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = SocialActivity.groupId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Group_.classPK) WHERE (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND ( Organization_.organizationId IN ( SELECT Users_Orgs.organizationId FROM Users_Orgs WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) ) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) AND (SocialRelation.type_ = ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivitySet WHERE ( SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.activitySetId IN ( SELECT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) ) OR ( SocialActivitySet.userId = ? ) )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SocialActivitySet WHERE ( SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) )

SELECT DISTINCT {SocialActivitySet.*} FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivitySet.modifiedDate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {SocialActivitySet.*} FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) AND (SocialRelation.type_ = ?) ORDER BY SocialActivitySet.modifiedDate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {SocialActivitySet.*} FROM SocialActivitySet WHERE ( SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.activitySetId IN ( SELECT SocialActivitySet.activitySetId FROM SocialActivitySet INNER JOIN SocialRelation ON (SocialRelation.userId2 = SocialActivitySet.userId) WHERE (SocialRelation.userId1 = ?) ) OR ( SocialActivitySet.userId = ? ) ) ORDER BY SocialActivitySet.modifiedDate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {SocialActivitySet.*} FROM SocialActivitySet WHERE ( SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_Orgs.groupId FROM Groups_Orgs INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON Users_Orgs.organizationId = Groups_Orgs.organizationId WHERE Users_Orgs.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Groups_UserGroups.groupId FROM Groups_UserGroups INNER JOIN Users_UserGroups ON Users_UserGroups.userGroupId = Groups_UserGroups.userGroupId WHERE Users_UserGroups.userId = ? ) OR SocialActivitySet.groupId IN ( SELECT Users_Groups.groupId FROM Users_Groups WHERE Users_Groups.userId = ? ) ) ORDER BY SocialActivitySet.modifiedDate DESC
